_comment: competitor-analysis researches competitors per platform, extracts entity intelligence, and produces a gap report.
description: Competitor research report: overserved topics, underserved angles, keyword gaps, entity gaps, and differentiation summary.

steps.condition: competitor-scan returned content samples from at least one platform
trend momentum is part of the request

note: Step 2 is conditional on competitor-scan returning usable content. All unverified competitor data carries [unverified] labels. Entity gap output from entity-extract feeds keyword-cluster in step 3 to ensure entity-rich keywords are considered.
